## Checklist
- [ ] I ran `make check` (or equivalent commands)
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] I updated docs/README/CONTRIBUTING when needed
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, model weights, or generated artifacts
- [ ] For model-impacting changes, I added evaluation metrics under `reports/` or in the PR notes
- [ ] For publication-impacting changes, I confirmed `tools/publication/` outputs still generate
